title: Fire breaks out at Mikeva, Mossel Bay
description: NATIONAL NEWS - Mossel Bay Fire, Rescue and...
bodyText:
NATIONAL NEWS - Mossel Bay Fire, Rescue and Disaster Management is at the scene of a structure fire at Mikeva Hyper in Mossel Bay.


> The Mossel Bay Municipality warned road users and pedestrians in the area of Mikeva, on the corner of Louis Fourie Road and Mossel Street, to be cautious in the area due to heavy smoke.


The cause of the fire is still unknown.

Mossel Bay Advertiser is on the scene.

See videos of the fire on sister publication, Mossel Bay Advertiser

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
